summary: Verified Teacher Lecture Conflict Detection and Reschedule Future Date features. Backend: All 5 core API tests passed via curl - conflict detection correctly rejects overlapping times with Arabic message including course name and time details, reschedule rejects past dates, no-conflict scenarios work correctly. Frontend: Playwright verified AddLectureModal has no day-selection buttons and displays day name after date selection.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ check_teacher_lecture_conflict (line 4374-4407): Correctly queries all courses by teacher_id, checks for time overlap with existing non-cancelled lectures, returns Arabic message with course name and time details
✓ create_lecture (line 4411-4467): Calls check_teacher_lecture_conflict before creating, rejects with 400 on conflict
✓ generate_semester_lectures_advanced (line 4561-4645): Calls check_teacher_lecture_conflict for each slot, skips conflicting slots silently (counts skipped)
✓ reschedule_lecture (line 4696-4800): Validates future date (line 4725-4734), calls check_teacher_lecture_conflict with exclude_lecture_id to avoid self-conflict
✓ AddLectureModal.tsx: Uses date picker only (line 207-226), displays day name after selection (lines 237-250), no day buttons
✓ course-lectures.tsx reschedule modal: Has min={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]} (line 1208), displays day name (lines 1233-1239)

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 core API tests passed via curl)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (verified AddLectureModal has no day buttons, day name displays correctly)

seed_data_creation: Used existing course 698f0000d803b27aab0120af with lecture on 2026-03-20 09:00-10:30
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher lecture conflict detection is fully working. POST /api/lectures and PUT /api/lectures/{id}/reschedule both check for time conflicts with other lectures assigned to the same teacher. Conflict message includes course name and time details in Arabic. AddLectureModal no longer has day-selection buttons - uses date picker only. Day name is displayed after selecting a date in both AddLectureModal and reschedule modal. Reschedule modal date picker has min date set to today.

tests: POST /api/lectures with overlapping time → 400 with Arabic conflict message 'يوجد تعارض: الأستاذ لديه محاضرة في مقرر ...'
PUT /api/lectures/{id}/reschedule with overlapping time → 400 with conflict message
PUT /api/lectures/{id}/reschedule with past date → 400 'يجب اختيار تاريخ مستقبلي'
PUT /api/lectures/{id}/reschedule with valid future date → 200 success
teacher_lecture_conflict_detection.conflict_message_format: يوجد تعارض: الأستاذ لديه محاضرة في مقرر "[course_name]" يوم [date] من [start_time] إلى [end_time]

changes: Day selection buttons (السبت، الأحد، etc.) removed - VERIFIED
Day name displays after date selection (e.g., 'الأربعاء - 25 مارس 2026') - VERIFIED
Date picker has min attribute set to today's date (line 1208)
Day name displays after date selection (lines 1233-1239)

test_1_create_lecture_conflict.actual: 400 with 'يوجد تعارض: الأستاذ لديه محاضرة في مقرر "دراسات حضرموت " يوم 2026-03-20 من 09:00 إلى 10:30'
